# PERF-210 negative: SCAN iterates incrementally
lang: go
file: PERF-210-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"strings"

	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func Handle(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client) (string, error) {
	var cursor uint64
	keys := make([]string, 0, 64)
	for {
		batch, next, err := rdb.Scan(ctx, cursor, "user:*", 100).Result()
		if err != nil {
			return "", err
		}
		keys = append(keys, batch...)
		if next == 0 {
			break
		}
		cursor = next
	}
	return strings.Join(keys, ","), nil
}
